register_system: Keigo mandatory: sonkeigo (respect listener), kenjougo (humble self), teineigo (polite); hierarchy critical. Trap: inconsistent levels = offense.
keigo_notes: Japanese honorific speech system — critical for document register; sonkeigo/kenjougo/teineigo encode social distance; essential in business/legal (wrong use disastrous).
translationese_traps: Omitted subjects/particles; keigo flattening; Western directness.
return_to_original_risks: Keigo level mismatch; kanji nuance loss; politeness erasure on roundtrip.
idiom_mapping_notes: Heavy functional (kanji compounds/cultural); nature/duty clusters; rare literal.
tutoring_pronunciation_hooks: Mora-timed (not stress); pitch accent; r-flap (no l/r).
professional_resources: JTF/business keigo guides; ATA; kanji dicts; Venuti cultural.
